per_example.predicted_cypher: MATCH (t:Track)-[:IN_ERA]->(e:Era {name: 'Pre-90s'}) MATCH (t)-[:BY]->(a:Artist) WITH a, sum(t.play_count) AS total_plays ORDER BY total_plays DESC LIMIT 10 RETURN a.name AS artist, total_plays
